entities.name: Anael
entities.raw_quote: Sexta ymago est diei Veneris, et angeli mandantes earn sunt Anael, Naquiel, Sagriel...

entities.name: Naquiel
entities.raw_quote: Sexta ymago est diei Veneris, et angeli mandantes earn sunt Anael, Naquiel, Sagriel...

entities.name: Sagriel
entities.raw_quote: Sexta ymago est diei Veneris, et angeli mandantes earn sunt Anael, Naquiel, Sagriel...

entities.name: Sarabores
entities.raw_quote: ...et venti sunt Sarabores, et 3es adiutores Trathacas...

entities.name: Trathacas
entities.raw_quote: ...et 3es adiutores Trathacas, Nasat, Nasaa.

entities.name: Nasat
entities.raw_quote: ...et 3es adiutores Trathacas, Nasat, Nasaa.

entities.name: Nasaa
entities.raw_quote: ...et 3es adiutores Trathacas, Nasat, Nasaa.

entities.name: Castuel
entities.raw_quote: Septima ymago est diei sabbati... hec ymago est multum honorata et preciosa... mandant isti angeli: Castuel, Maratron uel Matraton, Satael.

entities.name: Maratron
entities.raw_quote: ...mandant isti angeli: Castuel, Maratron uel Matraton, Satael.

entities.name: Matraton
entities.raw_quote: ...mandant isti angeli: Castuel, Maratron uel Matraton, Satael.

entities.name: Satael
entities.raw_quote: ...mandant isti angeli: Castuel, Maratron uel Matraton, Satael.

entities.name: Memmi
entities.raw_quote: Et venti huic seruientes sunt hij: Memmi, Aloybain, Atlas, Analuabith.

entities.name: Aloybain
entities.raw_quote: Et venti huic seruientes sunt hij: Memmi, Aloybain, Atlas, Analuabith.

entities.raw_quote: ...precite spiritibus Amamni- et Astaba...

entities.raw_quote: ...Hertanalit,’ 1 vt venia[n]t cito...

entities.name: Aysansasyel
entities.raw_quote: ...primus angelus est princeps, qui est in primo throno et in parte orientali... vocatur Aysansasyel...

entities.name: Ragiel
entities.raw_quote: 2o mense regnat et dominatin' princeps Ragiel cum suis seraitoribus.

entities.name: Dyrnaot
entities.raw_quote: 3o mense regnat et dominatur princeps Dyrnaot cum suis seraitoribus.

entities.name: Tanenon
entities.raw_quote: Secundum tempus: 4o mense regnat et serait princeps Tanenon cum suis seraitoribus.

entities.name: Terogat
entities.raw_quote: Quinto mense regnat et dominatur- 1 princeps Terogat cum suis seraitoribus.

entities.name: Morel
entities.raw_quote: Sexto mense regnat et dominatur princeps Morel cum suis seraitoribus.

entities.name: Patderon
entities.raw_quote: 3 m tempus: Septimo mense regnat et dominatur princeps Patderon cum suis seraitoribus.

entities.name: Illdegage
entities.raw_quote: Octauo mense regnat et dominatur princeps Illdegage cum suis seraitoribus.

entities.name: Andegor
entities.raw_quote: Nono mense regnat et dominatur princeps Andegor cum suis sont.

entities.name: Macgmel
entities.raw_quote: 4m tempus: Decimo mense regnat et dominatur princeps Macgmel cum suis seraitoribus.

entities.name: Assandaran
entities.raw_quote: Vndecimo mense regnat et dominatur princeps Assandaran cum suis seraitoribus.

entities.name: Abarthiel
entities.raw_quote: Duodecimo mense regnat et dominatur princeps 2 Abarthiel cum suis seraitoribus.

entities.name: Metraton
entities.raw_quote: Prima enim dies dominica 3 vocatur Metraton.

entities.name: Yaspel
